evals.prompt: Animate and assemble the work-deadline episode. Use the stills log from phase 3.
evals.expected_output: episode.mp4 at artifacts/work-deadline/episode.mp4. Primary approach: one Seedance reference-to-video call (not N per-beat calls). 05-summary.md listing approach (multi-shot or fallback), per-clip details, audio treatment, any fallbacks flagged. dashboard.html updated with completion and episode history entry.

evals.prompt: Animate the work-deadline episode. Beat 2 has no fal.media URL in stills-log.md.
evals.expected_output: Beat 2 handled as still-as-segment fallback (not silently dropped). Fallback flagged in 05-summary.md. Episode still assembles. episode.mp4 produced.

evals.prompt: Animate the monday-coffee episode. Seedance reference-to-video returns an error. Fall back gracefully.
evals.expected_output: Multi-shot attempt logged as failed. Fallback to per-beat bytedance/seedance-2.0/fast/image-to-video. episode.mp4 assembled. Fallback noted in 05-summary.md. dashboard.html updated.
